dependenciesInterpreter.name: Python interpreter
dependenciesInterpreter.description: Python interpreter path to use for dependencies installation

showPlacedID.name: Show placedIDs
showPlacedID.description: Whether to show the placedID of placed blocks in the flow builder.

allowRemotesOnNonSlurm.name: Non-slurm remotes
allowRemotesOnNonSlurm.description: Enable or disable remotes on non-slurm clusters. Sometimes regular blocks might need to access a remote cluster. Enable this setting to allow for regular blocks to access remotes.

developmentMode.name: Development mode
developmentMode.description: Development mode enables the developer tools in the application, such as plugin reloading. This setting requires the app to be reloaded.

extensionDevelopmentURL.name: Extension URL
extensionDevelopmentURL.description: When opening the extension 'Development', the URL to use in the iframe. Remember to disable CORS in your browser.

molstarHidden.name: Mol* hidden
molstarHidden.description: Whether to start the app with the Mol* panel visible or not.

queueWaitTime.name: Remote check interval
queueWaitTime.description: The interval in seconds to check for remote jobs status (in seconds).

darkMode.name: Dark mode (beta)
darkMode.description: Whether to use the dark theme or not.
